a.xlink:title: Per-frame context passed to systems during game loop updates.

High-level facade for entity manipulation in the ECS.

Type-indexed registry for engine resources with O(1) lookup.
Type-safe event bus for inter-system communication within the game loop.
Defines the Level class representing a game level or stage.
Immutable snapshot of viewport state for frame-consistent rendering.
Immutable snapshot of input state at a specific point in time.
Type alias for entity identifiers within an EntityPool.
Central manager for entity lifecycle and component storage.
Generic sparse set data structure for efficient entity-component storage.
Type alias for entity version numbers used in handle validation.
Aggregate module for helios::engine::ecs::types.
Compile-time type identifier for component types.

Utility for generating unique type indices at runtime.
Aggregate module for helios::core::data namespace.
Component for parent-child entity relationships.

Lightweight GUID (globally unique identifier) implementation.

Tag component indicating an inactive entity.

Registry for mapping command types to their handlers.

Double-buffered, type-indexed message system for decoupled inter-system communication.
